canonical_table_hash IS NOT NULL)

	$o['ps_feeding_life_stage']=$wpdb->get_results("SELECT DISTINCT
		JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(condition_dimensions,'$.life_stage')) val, COUNT(*) n
		FROM {$R} WHERE condition_dimensions LIKE '%life_stage%'
		AND feeding_table_id IN (SELECT id FROM {$TB} WHERE status='verified' AND is_active=1 AND canonical_table_hash IS NOT NULL)
		GROUP BY val", ARRAY_A);
